title: Claim Review Manual for Research and Technology Advisors - Canada.ca
content:
## Claim Review Manual for Research and Technology Advisors
The Claim Review Manual ( CRM ) cancelled and replaced The Guide to Conducting a SR&ED Review and Directive 2004-03 SR&ED Reports and was effective as of June 1, 2010.

## Changes to the Claim Review Manual for Research and Technology Advisors
Reasons for revision
This revision accommodates a recently announced service and the Eligibility of Work for SR&ED Investment Tax Credits Policy .
The First-Time Claimant Advisory Service ( FTCAS ) , which was announced in Economic Action Plan 2013, was made available publicly on January 1, 2014. The Eligibility of Work for SR&ED Investment Tax Credits Policy was released on December 19, 2012.
This revision includes modifications and updates to reflect these changes as well as clarification and simplification of certain topics. The text of this document has been revised; see Appendix B.1.1 Explanation of changes .

## CRM Table of Contents
Chapter 1.0: Introduction
Chapter 2.0: Overview and general information
Chapter 3.0: Guidelines for coordinated review
Chapter 4.0: Planning the review
Chapter 5.0: Conducting the review
Chapter 6.0: Documenting the review
Chapter 7.0: Finalizing the review
Chapter 8.0: Glossary
Chapter 9.0: Appendices

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
